_comment: Known FlowWink fleet — name → Supabase project ref. No secrets here; the DB password is passed via the PGPW env var at runtime. Add new sites as they are provisioned. poolerHost = the instance's Supavisor pooler (user postgres.<ref>, port 6543) — preferred over db.<ref>.supabase.co, which resolves IPv6-only and is unreachable from IPv4-only networks. Look it up via GET https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/<ref>/config/database/pooler.
